message:
fix(tx): make Failed non-terminal so it can transition to Compensating

Failed was treated as terminal (no further transitions) but should
allow transition to Compensating. Add is_settled() capturing the
broader concept (terminal OR failed-awaiting-compensation). Handle
PauseSuspended commit outcome: paused tx stays Pending instead of
being marked failed. Update test to assert Failed is NOT terminal
but IS settled.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
